hero.tagline: We don't tell you what to think.
hero.tagline_accent: We show you where the information comes from.
hero.description: unsere.news is an open-source, community-driven investigative news platform. The community votes on topics, and we produce AI-powered, human-verified Deep-Dives built strictly on primary sources — every claim linked directly to its source.

banner.text: Every article AI-researched, editorially reviewed, traceable to primary sources.

transparent.title: Radical Transparency
transparent.body: Every published Fact Card is traceable to a verifiable primary source — government PDFs, scientific papers, raw data — accessible in a single click.

community.title: Community-Driven
community.body: The community votes on which topics get investigated. No editorial gatekeeping. When a topic crosses the vote threshold, the research begins automatically.

open.title: Open Source
open.body: MIT licensed. Public repository from day one. The code, methodology, and funding are all open for inspection.

steps.b: Any member can submit a verifiable question.
Topics with enough support get commissioned.
AI gathers primary sources; editors verify manually.
Fact Cards instead of prose — one source per claim.
